title: Fortinet FortiGate Log Generator
description: Generates sample Fortinet FortiGate FortiOS 7.x traffic and UTM log entries in key=value syslog format. Produces a realistic mix of accept and deny actions across traffic, UTM/IPS, VPN, and system event log types. Approximately 60% of generated entries are accepted and 40% are denied/blocked to simulate a realistic partial-block scenario.

generate_fortinet_logs.name: generate_fortinet_logs
generate_fortinet_logs.description: Builds sample Fortinet FortiGate FortiOS 7.x log lines in standard key=value syslog format covering traffic forward, UTM IPS, VPN event, and system event log families.

ingest_logs_to_grail.name: ingest_logs_to_grail
ingest_logs_to_grail.description: Parses the generated Fortinet key=value log lines and sends them to the Dynatrace Log Ingest API v2 with normalized and vendor-prefixed attributes.

analyze_fortinet_logs.name: analyze_fortinet_logs
analyze_fortinet_logs.description: Produces a breakdown of Fortinet log events by type, action, policy, and IPS signature to validate the generator is producing realistic data.
